commit.message:
Fix crawler pipeline: remove broken partition filter and fix Flyway version

- Remove partition-based URL filtering from CrawlScheduler that silently
  dropped URLs dequeued by the wrong downloader instance
- Remove incompatible flyway-database-postgresql:10.8.1 dependency that
  crashed url-seen (AbstractMethodError with flyway-core 9.x)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove obsolete version attribute from docker-compose.yml

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Gradle SIGSEGV crash in Docker builds on ARM (Apple Silicon)

Switch build stage from eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-alpine to eclipse-temurin:21-jdk
to avoid musl libc native library crash, and add --no-watch-fs flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify connection path in architecture diagram

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

feat: market cap minimum, quarterly earnings, signal intelligence fix

OOS gap investigation: best 50 by CAR were 48/50 micro/small-cap lottery
tickets (300%+ returns). OOS can't predict penny stock moonshots — it
predicts direction, not magnitude. Q1→Q5 quintile analysis confirms OOS
works: Q5 avg +3.3% vs Q1 -0.2%.

Fix: Signal intelligence now filters to tradeable universe (mid+ cap)
so best/worst profiles reflect options-tradeable signals.

- Add min_market_cap='mid' ($1B+) to TRADING_RULES
- CAP_ORDER ranking + _passes_cap_filter() helper
- simulate_trades skips micro/small-cap signals
- Signal intelligence: quarterly earnings (0-90d cap instead of raw
  days_to_earnings with 999/annual pollution). Shows pct_pre_earnings_30d.
- Dashboard: LOW CAP tag on untradeable signals, earnings shows "d" suffix
- Export: tradeable flag + market_cap per signal

split the remaining space causing the big gap. Removed it so hide-btn
sits flush after the toolbar.

at top-right — same position as the hide button, so it's findable.

fix: remove Vercel Secrets references from vercel.json

Environment variables must be set directly in the Vercel dashboard,
not via the @secret_name legacy syntax which requires pre-created secrets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Add trame UI with full analysis pipeline, thermal CTE, and VTK visualization

Replaces Streamlit prototype with a production trame/vuetify3 application:

UI / Application
- trame_app.py: single-page entry point on port 8502
- trame_app/pages/: Pre-Processing, Solution Setup, Results, Visualization tabs
- trame_app/state.py: centralised DEFAULTS + DB persistence helpers
- trame_app/engine.py: async pipeline stages (mesh, beam, buckling, material SG)
- trame_app/vtk_views.py: PyVista plotter management; stable scalar range across
  warp factor changes via _force_scalar_range (pins mapper + LUT after render)
- run_trame.ps1: PowerShell launcher with optional watchdog hot-reload

Pre-Processing
- Fiber / resin / lamina library with add, edit, delete and CTE fields
- SwiftComp material SG (UD and woven) with thermoelastic analysis=1 mode
- CTE auto-populated from SG output; manual override fields in lamina save form
- Layup designer: ply reorder (↑/↓), inline angle edit, delete buttons
- Success snackbar after each DB save

Solver / backend fixes
- SwiftCompMaterialSolver: analysis=1 (thermoelastic) when constituent CTEs are
  non-zero; CTE lines written immediately after elastic constants (no blank line)
- Woven input: weft CTE rotated (cte11_w = cte22_f, cte22_w = cte11_f)
- _parse_text_fallback: captures alpha11/alpha22 from .sc.k thermal section
- Thermal pipeline: ply CTE transformed by angle (cte11·cos²θ + cte22·sin²θ)
  so cross-section temperature gradients produce correct transverse bending
- GXBeam: distributed thermal moments computed from angle-transformed CTE

VTK colormap stability
- _scalar_clim checks cell_data fallback (stress arrays are cell-centred)
- show_buckling_mode / show_deformed_beam call plotter.render() then
  _force_scalar_range to pin mapper + LUT range before view_update serialises
- autoscale_data_range also updates LUT range; used directly by toolbar button
- scalar_name fallback checks cell_data so switching to S12 etc. finds the array

Tests
- tests/test_trame_engine.py, test_trame_state.py, test_vtk_views.py

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(plan-b): move tour trigger to "Dial it in" transition

Remove auto-start tour on first visit — incompatible with quick start
mode since tour steps target full-mode elements. Instead, trigger the
tour when user clicks "Dial it in" to enter full mode (first time only).

commit.message:
Fix watchOS archive export and bump version to 1.1

Revert SKIP_INSTALL to YES on watch target — standalone/Family Setup
is enabled by WKRunsIndependentlyOfCompanionApp, not SKIP_INSTALL.
SKIP_INSTALL=NO caused two top-level apps in the archive, breaking
export. Bump version to 1.1 since 1.0 was already approved.

fix: live ticker band — direct FMP fetch, real gold/silver spot prices

- Rewrote /api/quotes to call FMP directly (one request per symbol)
  instead of through provider abstraction that silently failed on Vercel
- Root cause: FMP /stable/quote doesn't support comma-separated batch
  requests — returns [] silently
- Swapped GLD/SLV ETFs for XAUUSD/XAGUSD real spot prices per ounce
- Fixed cache.ts setCache to handle Vercel read-only filesystem
- Changed FMP/Finnhub providers from next revalidate to cache no-store
- Skip navigation for commodity symbols in ticker band

fix: correct dealer direction logic and improve price/size parsing in AI transcript analysis

The prompt had BUY/SELL directions reversed — "Your bid?" was mapped to
SELL when it should be BUY (dealer buys from client), and "Offer?" was
mapped to BUY when it should be SELL (dealer sells to client).

Also improved prompt to handle trailing slashes in prices (e.g. "100/"),
added server-side price sanitization, and ensured size=0 returns null.

  pending COs, drift score), voice recording via Web Speech API, crew count
  and weather tracking, save/edit to Airtable DAILY_NOTES table

Update about page text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(canvas): auto-show web apps in canvas after build

promptRequestsCanvasArtifactOutput() now also triggers for web app creation
prompts (React, Next.js, Vue, Vite, etc.) even without the word "canvas" in
the prompt. Previously the canvas artifact contract only fired when "canvas"
was literally mentioned, so agents would stop at code generation.

Added promptIsMultiFileWebAppCreation() helper that detects build verbs paired
with app/ui/dashboard nouns as the detection signal.

Added WEB APP BUILD + SHOW WORKFLOW instruction block to the canvas tool
description so the agent knows to: pick the right approach (canvas_push for
single-file output, canvas_open_url for dev server, or canvas_push built dist),
using whichever workspace is available. Code generation alone is not a
complete result.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: Proposals

commit.message:
fix(agent): escape build tasks from research source-validation false-positives

taskLikelyNeedsWebEvidence() was triggering on broad keywords like "breaking"
or "news" even when the task was building a tool *about* those topics — not
fetching live data. Added build-intent counterweight (create/build/make an app,
implement, etc.) so build tasks skip the research evidence requirement.

requiresStrictResearchClaimValidation() now also short-circuits when the agent
created files during the task, since the output describes built artifacts rather
than factual claims about current events.

Updated context-manager-compaction test to use 1000-char filler messages
(~250 tokens each) so 35 messages reliably exceed the 8,000-token budget
and actually trigger the compaction path being tested.

I'm single, this is the least complicated thing about me).

The joke is the door. The sincerity is the room.

Decomplect: 5 refactors for purity, deduplication, FCIS

1. calculatePrices(config, state) — truly pure, accepts args instead of globals
2. hasAnyTool(mode, tools, toolConfig) — fully pure with explicit toolConfig param
3. renderBreakdown + renderOptionHighlights — data-driven loops replace 11 repetitions
4. Extract validateCartState() + buildCartPayload() + payloadToFormData() as pure functions
5. Extract syncItemRows() in tools.js — deduplicates extras/individual sync (25 lines saved)

addToCart is now: pure validate → DOM feedback. submitCart is now: pure build → thin I/O shell.

commit.message:
Fix dark mode readability: FAQ inline colors + blog article hardcoded styles

Replace hardcoded inline colors in FAQ sections across 6,441 city/compare
pages so text and borders respond to dark mode via CSS variables:
- color: #1d1d1f → var(--text-primary)
- color: #4a4a4c → var(--text-body)
- border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f2 → var(--border-light)

Fix geographic-pay-differentials blog article which used a custom template
with hardcoded colors throughout (article card, headings, body text, data
tables, nav, footer) — all replaced with existing CSS variables.

refactor: extract mode-specific state structs and reduce code duplication (#30)

Split model's 62 fields into 8 sub-structs (detailState, exportState,
aiState, snippetState, profileState, histSearchState, completionState,
sidebarState) to clarify ownership and reduce cross-mode coupling.

Also extracted shared helpers (moveCursor, overlayModal, calcModalWidth),
split renderStatusBar into focused functions (statusHints,

mode, export mode, and cursor helper.
